<size=48>トレスリア地方の三大国家の代表が集い<br>前線基地をめぐる会:
The representatives of Treslia's Three Nations
gathered, and talks were underway regarding the frontline base——
へ～。<br>やるじゃないの、あのコ:
Well, well.
Not bad at all, that girl.
アリシア殿は中立の立場の人間だ。<br>交渉人としては最適だったと言える:
Lady Alicia is neutral.
She was the ideal negotiator.
我々が直接交渉に出向いても<br>あの男には断られていただろうしな:
Even if we had gone to negotiate directly,
that man would have refused us.
かの“英雄”の血を引き、<br>そして智謀に長けた策略家……:
A descendant of the 'Hero',
and a cunning master of strategy...
三大国の上層部が彼の頭脳を恐れて<br>辺境の地に追いやったんだもの:
The upper echelons of the Three Nations
feared his intellect and banished him to the frontier.
そりゃ<br>恨まれても当然よねぇ～:
Well,
it's only natural for him to resent us~
しかし、追いやった“危険分子”に<br>再び頼ることになるとはね……:
And yet, we find ourselves relying once again
on the 'dangerous element' we cast aside...
大穴の脅威に対抗できるような<br>適任者は他にいないと思うが:
I believe there is no one else
suited to face the threat of the Abyss.
でも前線基地がちゃんと機能すれば<br>大穴は、ただの脅威ではなくなるわ:
But if the frontline base functions properly,
the Abyss becomes more than just a threat.
あそこに眠る希少な鉱石や資源、<br>まさに宝の山だもの♪:
The rare ores and resources lying within—
a veritable treasure trove♪
盗掘家も増えているらしいわ……<br>取り締まりは強化しないとね:
I hear illegal mining is on the rise too...
We'll need to crack down harder on it.
大穴の資源は、三大国だけでなく<br>“千国連合”も渇望していると聞く:
I hear the resources of the Abyss are coveted
not only by us, but by the 'Thousand Nations Alliance'.
千国連合ねぇ～……<br>小国の寄せ集めのくせに生意気ね！:
The Thousand Nations Alliance~...
A rabble of small countries acting so brazenly!
問題は、大穴の中に生息する<br>数多くのモンスター……そして……:
The problem is the countless monsters
inhabiting the Abyss... and...
大穴から出現する巨大な怪物……<br>『厄災』……:
The massive creatures that emerge from the Abyss...
the 'Calamities'...
先の戦いで各国兵力の<br>約半数を失ってしまった……:
In the previous battle,
each nation lost nearly half its forces...
基地の強化と戦力増強は急務だ！<br>猶予はそれほど残されていない！:
Strengthening the base and our forces is urgent!
We don't have much time left!
とにかくあの男の智謀に<br>賭けてみるしかないわね……:
For now, we have no choice but to bet
everything on that man's resourcefulness...
英雄の血筋がどんなものか<br>お手並み拝見と行きましょ♪:
Let's see what the bloodline of
a hero is truly worth♪
そうだな。今は『英雄の血』だけが、<br>我々の唯一の“希望”なのだから……:
Indeed. For now, the 'Blood of the Hero'
is our only 'hope'...
